textByHash.7c52d44b4c328ebfa5612488b21677ca2983cc8f: Hello there, welcome to Varrock Museum! Can I help you?
textByHash.395861d1dc4db006b41ee218c6f3f799e1a22dac: That's grand! We're always glad to have more facts. Now, tell me what you know...
textByHash.cfe067a2187c6c2284d9933cc9052bf244f8af00: That's handy. Zombies do tend to leave horrible muddy footprints around the place. So what actually happened with them?
textByHash.9679f4c9d8249c91b619d5ab0c75bb9f51747233: My, my, that is all very interesting. I shall make sure the display is updated at once! Display number 24, 4th Age, year 700-800.
textByHash.99a944283f9b202a8265ec29c1d6ce5fcc77ea9a: Oh, and before I forget, we found this old lamp lying around. Since you've done such a sterling job, we'd like you to have it.
textByHash.9c514c74ce02ea5ba876c97d65afddccfa72152d: Well, as you can see we have recently expanded a great deal to cope with the influx of finds from the Dig Site. Also, of course, to prepare for the new dig we're opening soon.
textByHash.84e96be6ea6e6dcdae3d90c0e5de20ab8d086426: Well, we recently had a large chunk of funds donated to us, so we sent out all sorts of explorers - I'm sure you'll meet them as you go around the world. People like Simon down in the desert near the pyramid as well
textByHash.ff66a6a0d707aa96effefe9c6c07e5cef65c0823: as Aristarchus in Pollnivneach, Varmen and, of course, Anna Jones. Anyway, we think we have discovered an island that has massive archaeological significance. We can't say much beyond that at this point, as we haven't
textByHash.269dabdecc6e8549c36636818c979a7cc811b79d: researched it. If you have the qualifications and help us out around the museum, I'm sure we could offer you a place on the dig when we're ready to go.
textByHash.8fc2a2ccb9ab10a2981bec3bce0dfaa91a46e805: Delrith! Incredible! I am grateful to you for letting me know. Please tell me more about Silverlight and I'll get a display erected. Display number 25, 5th Age, year 20.
textByHash.1f560c451bfe89156bc43ce1e440542b29f28ba1: Yes, yes, we were most pleased to have the shield returned - as was the King, I imagine. This is wonderful news, I shall make sure the display is updated at once! Display number 24, 5th Age, year 700-800.
textByHash.7c77ad09a891aec5a76b5e02ca65bac34136b433: Oh, and before I forget, we found this old lamp lying around...and since you've done such a sterling job, we'd like you to have it.
textByHash.0182b985aca77346d43c40dd6900f8ab7d885046: Ah, I heard about that. Tell me more.
textByHash.6d353e49c24ded26756aebcac26d1bdb5aded161: Sounds like magic to me! I'll get a display put up immediately. Display number 21, the first display of the 5th Age.
textByHash.71433edcb898842508b0444a1101e90615d0461e: That would help immensely. Restored it, eh? And it works, you say? Excellent, perhaps we can get to some real stargazing now! Display number 17, 5th Age, year 70.
textByHash.127f23bb940cbe5e6026c03f6cd239e896f034f6: Is that some kind of spell?
textByHash.343a91215691395c7c26b9174c36204c7179f605: What kingdom does he rule then?
textByHash.df477ed7cf4b677689e9fc846cdf183dd17a0ad9: That's amazing! So he's really from another world! Well, this is interesting, I'll make sure a display is put up immediately. Well done! Display number 9, 5th Age, year 132.
textByHash.6d5e215a2537b49ab0a301897872ac3b18ed9ffd: Oh? You mean those little green fellows with their gliders?
textByHash.1ff6537b8bce9663cd3350cbeb0baf8354536f2a: A black demon! How did you survive!?
textByHash.2e792971490756172abc0273ae1f730e59a779fa: You mean that those flimsy things can fly with more than a gnome in? That is unexpected. I shall update the display immediately. Display number 10, upstairs in the middle of the room!
textByHash.cec6dab90fbe9f9fdbc26470fe50f43e0be1ad59: Ahh, the Temple Knights...little is known of them.
textByHash.86bac39b06cd3e43a736574eaabc86ed1e375798: Quite worrying that it's just a bit of water keeping them there, but Saradomin will protect us I've no doubt. Thank you for the information, I'll get a display put up. Display number 23, 4th Age, year 1100-1200.
textByHash.0d4eab9595a855f2ecf2e6de3d8b3efc0a105406: Quite worrying that it's just a bit of water keeping them there, but Saradomin will protect us, I've no doubt. Thank you for the information, I'll get a display put up. Display number 23, 4th Age, year 1100-1200.
textByHash.2d41e530643c6dc6d45b623fc7ef525552693b11: The little black cat that used to wander around sometimes? Sure, I remember him.
textByHash.76f9b4f41272963216aa2dc973efdb872ce0cdf3: This is starting to sound familiar...
textByHash.1084c344eb10fc0cc66b6f02a82fb279e894e1aa: You mean that was Bob? Wow... I will get a display erected immediately about the history of this brave warrior. Display number 20, 4th Age, year 1-100.
textByHash.9d63276ea54e79703e8a05be37a25fa00f0b3646: Oh? I'd be interested to hear this, we have a painting of him upstairs.
textByHash.2daf4923aa4e090d27c89a300623d7672491c510: Ahh, is this relating to that small museum near Ardougne?
textByHash.d8ae6a84b0925d1097922db1ae96a1d473376cd6: Ahh yes, we've been meaning to make a display on that for some time. They sent us some information, too; I'm glad you reminded me, I'll get that done now. Display number 46, 5th Age, year 98.
textByHash.3f8b398c4ceacc6019f665d251ae6b3ad1504f8c: That's excellent, I'll get a display put up straight away! Display number 28, end of the 2nd Age.
textByHash.e7f1f94fe265d23908215f02df8e3e8c468ebbf8: Now that is what you call a story. Tell me more so that I can put it up on the display.
textByHash.795792ee91404f4bfc69769c0c832ba51d2ea466: This is wonderful, I shall have a display made immediately to go with the staff model. Display number 28, end of the 2nd Age.
textByHash.8722bf287df50b2ec7b3f662fbcf7cd4b752d2af: Oh? Is that the family over near Ardougne?
textByHash.91cd54a930c9d3f61d0f880ac1f0c7146cefeae8: How exciting, I'll get a display put up immediately. Display number 7, 5th Age, year 7.
textByHash.b9c4220b173dddbbf951cf8511a3ec729f93177c: Oh, thank Saradomin for that. So, tell me the story!
textByHash.d1053dc52c657f46f25279d184a10846234da2f6: A rat asked you to fill a folder?
textByHash.47f4eb2c061c9b688c482704c969d3942ad03e6e: I don't suppose you have any evidence of this cult?
textByHash.7ef44d2d8414f27025160703369261c904e246a6: That sounds good - bring me that and we'll create a display.
textByHash.a0349f285234ff4568f4e561079206013b2e49f0: Why, thank you... Yes, this is a bit of a revelation! I'll get a display put up immediately. Display number 3, 5th Age, year 70.
textByHash.5bfd7b1ad4bd0dc9ed7f05b473fed803e2d38848: No matter. I'm sure you'll find more. Look around the Museum, explore the city and maybe do some quests, and I'm sure you'll find out something worth telling.
textByHash.09b8e1e015e21b74328293cf347e04406cf0189c: I'd be delighted to; which areas are you interested in?
textByHash.43c0e37a12826245037ca3d45de6113ce5ce1358: Ahh, our newest expansion. The Natural History exhibit in the basement was set up to inform our citizens of the weird and wonderful diversity in our environment today. Indeed, I am sure you will recognise some of
textByHash.c2248a58efbe4ef4f1195e4b427697a73292d487: the creatures down there. Hopefully, our lectures will teach you some things you didn't know about them!
textByHash.5775607fa270931b4711b8b9c37880f8c3f61f51: Ahh, I see. The 'history' refers to that of the species - it doesn't necessarily mean it's died out. After all, we have human history and we're still here!
textByHash.7ec5798690ac72da57cc9337bea678830d942bec: Ahh, those. We're slowly filling them up with the help of people who have their Earth Sciences exams completed at the Dig Site. If you have, feel free to give us a hand. We'd appreciate it.
textByHash.33200b012409846b008a6bb591ceea898be665f2: The cleaning area, yes. Well, we have some really good archaeologists on site right now. They're cleaning up the finds that are shipped over from the Dig Site to the east of here. If you have the right qualifications, you can help them clean the finds.
textByHash.a8851dfd812839dc54f82bae2244b539501cc760: Level 3 Earth Science exams. You can take them over at the Exam Centre on the Dig Site.
textByHash.89eda407b5e97fb36aa06ce3e9940673e867eb2d: I'm sure you can get them easily enough. Just pop over to the Exam Centre on the Dig Site and speak to one of the examiners there.
textByHash.e13d827d4ab93351be83e8d37ea98c48ea9a4170: That's excellent. Keep up the good work and soon you'll be cleaning finds with the best of them.
textByHash.c1b0d1641b506e62ab2912985d75b5c347685352: That's excellent. If you feel like helping us out, pop downstairs and clean up some finds for us.
textByHash.7ec468e31226d705387f2d4ad52fa1f189ecbe2c: Ahh, my speciality. Being a historian, matters of the past are my passion. Collated on this floor and the one above are just part of my life's work. I am still working on updating and finding out more everyday, so if you find
textByHash.3d21504952bfc332095b896f80cbd0f62d7a584c: any information on your travels that may be useful, please do let me know.
textByHash.74c4ef88ce9bd3257da076fa7fd7e34a707fea05: You can follow the timeline of the history of Gielinor from the creation of the world to the present day, simply by walking around this display. A wondrous journey, I think you'll agree!
